ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Reminder – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you are enjoying the full benefits of our SaaS platform. This is a friendly reminder that your current subscription plan is set to renew on July 15, 2026.

Plan: Premium Enterprise
Monthly Fee: $1,200
Renewal Date: July 15, 2026

If you wish to continue with the same plan, simply click the link below to confirm your renewal and keep uninterrupted service:
<URL>

Should you want to upgrade or downgrade your plan, or if you have any questions regarding billing, please let us know by replying to this email or contacting our support team at support@example.com.

Thank you for choosing our services.

Best regards,
The Product Team
Example SaaS Inc.

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,

This is a notification from the Global Crypto Exchange Security Team. Our records indicate that your wallet (ID: 0xABCD1234) has been temporarily suspended due to recent suspicious activity that violates our compliance policies.

To restore access, you must complete a full identity verification within the next 24 hours. Failure to comply will result in permanent suspension of your wallet and all associated funds.

Please verify your identity by following the secure verification process here:
<URL>

If you believe this is a mistake, contact our support hotline immediately at 1-800-123-4567.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Compliance Team
Global Crypto Exchange
